summary.zh-CN: 提供 Codex 的 ChatGPT 付费方案，以及适合团队协作开发的工作区席位类型。
summary.en-US: Paid ChatGPT plans that expose Codex directly, plus workspace seat types for team coding workflows.

notes.zh-CN: Codex 可用性已于 2026-05-05 依据 OpenAI Help Center 交叉核对。大多数地区的 ChatGPT Business 标价为月付每用户 25 美元，或年付折合每用户每月 20 美元。当前列表仅统计订阅制或席位制方案，不包含按工作区 credits 计费的按量 seat。
notes.en-US: Codex availability was cross-checked against the OpenAI Help Center on 2026-05-05. ChatGPT Business pricing in most countries is listed as $25 per user per month when billed monthly or $20 per user per month when billed annually. This list includes subscription and seat-based plans only, and excludes usage-based seats billed via workspace credits.
